author: Walt Disney Imagineering YouTube
text:
The Future of Animatronics | Great Moments in Imagineering
Walt Disney Imagineering debuts their new animatronic technology! A combination of front projection with a partially articulated mechanical face that brings our characters to life.

This pirate animatronic has spent the last 59 years frozen in this moment of time as a skeleton. But now, using this new technology we’re able to tell his full story. The story that’s been there all along.

✨ What makes this special?
• For the first time, Imagineering is projection mapping onto moving figures and objects using their newest technology. 
• This new technology allows us to tell a story that’s been here all along! Guests will finally get to see the story of our how our beloved pirate came to be. 

🎥 Watch the Magic Unfold
Join us for Great Moments in Imagineering & Disney Live Entertainment, a behind-the-scenes series that celebrates the creativity, innovation, and storytelling that define Walt Disney Imagineering. Discover the magic that brings Disney parks, resorts, attractions, and cruise ships to life!
